basic_details.organization_name: Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (BMHRC)
basic_details.short_information: The Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (BMHRC) has officially announced the Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification has been released for Medical Officer posts on a contractual basis. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 70 years and hold an MBBS degree with compulsory rotating internship are eligible to attend the walk-in interview. Preference will be given to candidates with three or more years of relevant experience. Interested candidates can participate in the walk-in selection process scheduled for 18 June 2026. Direct links to download the notificat

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree with compulsory rotating internship. Preference to candidates with 3+ years of experience.
qualification.details: Medical Officer: A recognized Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) degree qualification included in the First Schedule or Second Scheduled or Part II of the Third Schedule (Other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Completion of compulsory rotating internship. Preference will be given to those candidates who have three or more years of experience.

all_official_links.label: Download BMHRC Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMHRC Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 18th June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all necessary documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized MBBS degree with a compulsory rotating internship. Preference will be given to those with 3 or more years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 70 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BMHRC Medical Officer vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is a walk-in interview. You need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents and the application form.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the BMHRC Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for Unreserved, EWS, and OBC categories is Rs. 590/- (non-refundable). No fee is mentioned for other categories.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Bhopal Memorial Hospital and Research Centre (BMHRC), Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, 462038.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a walk-in interview. There is no online application process.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to report for the walk-in interview between 09:00 AM and 10:00 AM on the scheduled date.
